feed.title: AO3 - Stephanie Brown/Jason Todd (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Stephanie Brown/Jason Todd on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: nursing
entry.summary:
Author: September_Aster

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,401Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 11

Summary: “Oh, you're actually here,” she asked surprised. “Yeah, did you think I wasn't coming back?” “I thought that maybe I was hallucinating.” “You’re not, I’m real. I've bought you some medicine for your cold but you should eat some chicken soup first.” “I don’t have any soup.” “I know, I made it for you.”

entry.title: Broken Birds
entry.summary:
Author: AnyoneCanBeNerdy

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 54,698Chapters: 12/?Kudos: 86

Summary: AU where after Jason's death, Tim still becomes Robin. Then gets taken by The Joker, and turned into JJ. This is kept a secret, with most of the world (Including Stephanie Brown) thinking Robin was killed. Stephanie Brown took the mantle and was fired. When she escaped from Black Mask after being tortured a newly returned to Gotham Jason Todd spots her, and seeing her look like she should be dead already... he does the only thing he can think of. Get her to a hidden Lazarus Pit. Meanwhile, Dick and Cass confront Bruce about two Robins dying and one being mentally broken. **Fic will update every other Wednesday**

entry.title: And that's how you do the watermelon crawl
entry.summary:
Author: Flowsthroughwind

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 15,123Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 7

Summary: Finals are over and Jason has an idea of something they can do for at least part of their summer. “So, summer’s staring us down. Got any grand plans, or are we just surviving on leftover takeout and bad TV?”“Surviving sounds about right, but I was thinking... maybe we do something a little different.”

entry.title: How to be...
entry.summary:
Author: Flowsthroughwind

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 31,211Chapters: 10/10Kudos: 128

Summary: For the first time in his life Jason has a chance to just be... Jason.Not the Red Hood.Not J.T. Wayne.Not a member of Gotham's First Family. Just Jason.And as far as he can see, college kids are very... odd.

entry.title: The 28th life
entry.summary:
Author: AvengingJustice

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 21,878Chapters: 9/?Kudos: 198

Summary: He’s been a hero, a killer, a god, and a ghost. Now reborn as the son of Antonia Stark and Bruce Wayne, Harry’s twenty-eighth life is the most interesting. Filled with gods, aliens, superpowered people and other stuff, Harry has to do whatever he can to make sure he and those he cares about comes out unharmed
